stemHtml: Which statement accurately reflects the approximate and average distribution of water vapor content in the Earth's atmosphere?

options.a: Almost 0 g/m3 near the poles to as much as 25 g/m3 at the equator.
options.b: More or less equally distributed due to movements of air masses.
options.c: Higher water vapour content at the poles and less at the equator.
options.d: 8 g/m<sup>3</sup> at the poles and 15 g/m<sup>3</sup> at the equator.
